title: viola laricicola
intro: Viola laricicola, also known as the Chinese violet or Yon-ji, is a type of flowering plant native to China, characterized by its small, blue-purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Viola laricicola is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
